signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is still down while the tape still shows fresh shorts pressing rather than a clean reversal.
RESOLV has upside momentum, but liquidity is too poor and veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
LIT remains a modest short lean because the tape is still weak and fresh shorts are still pressing rather than a clean reversal forming.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
GRIFFAIN is already in a flush state and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short entry after the move.
VVV remains a reduced-size fade because it is still green on the day and still reads as a short-covering rally rather than a full washout.
WLFI is the only real long candidate on this board because funding is deeply negative while price and open interest are both still rising together, but veto keeps it reduced-confidence only.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
TON remains a modest catch-down short lean because it is still too green relative to the broader tape and has not fully unwound yet.
